dashboard.label: File Activity Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor file creation and modifications in critical directories

search.query: index=endpoint EventCode=11 | eval file_dir=case(match(TargetFilename, ".*\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\.*"), "System32", match(TargetFilename, ".*\\\\Program Files.*"), "Program Files", 1=1, "Other") | timechart count by file_dir limit=4

index=endpoint EventCode=11 | where match(TargetFilename, ".*\\\\Windows\\\\(System32|SysWOW64)\\\\.*") OR match(TargetFilename, ".*\\\\Program Files.*") | fields _time, Computer, Image, TargetFilename, User | sort - _time

index=endpoint EventCode=11 | eval file_ext=case(match(TargetFilename, ".*\\.exe$"), ".exe", match(TargetFilename, ".*\\.dll$"), ".dll", match(TargetFilename, ".*\\.sys$"), ".sys", match(TargetFilename, ".*\\.bat$"), ".bat", match(TargetFilename, ".*\\.ps1$"), ".ps1", 1=1, "Other") | stats count by file_ext | sort - count
